scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client --include=dev
scripts.build: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client --include=dev && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.dev: npm run dev --prefix server & npm run dev --prefix client
scripts.build:koyeb: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client --include=dev && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.start:koyeb: npm ci --prefix server --omit=dev && ([ -f client/dist/index.html ] || (npm ci --prefix client --include=dev && npm run build --prefix client)) && npm start --prefix server
